title: Diagonal Swipes
shortDescription: Slide a 2×2 selection and diagonally swap tiles to match a target pattern.
description: Move the 2×2 selection overlay one step in any direction. The up-left swap (↖) exchanges the top-left and bottom-right cells of the overlay. The up-right swap (↗) exchanges the top-right and bottom-left cells. Rearrange the board to match the target pattern shown in the goal.
